mapper.select:
SELECT next_record.category_id FROM time_record prev_record JOIN time_record next_record ON prev_record.user_id = next_record.user_id AND prev_record.date = next_record.date WHERE prev_record.user_id = #{userId} AND prev_record.category_id = #{previousCategoryId} AND next_record.start_time = prev_record.end_time + 1 AND next_record.category_id != #{previousCategoryId} AND prev_record.is_deleted = 0 AND next_record.is_deleted = 0
AND DAYOFWEEK(prev_record.date) IN (2, 3, 4, 5, 6)
AND DAYOFWEEK(prev_record.date) IN (1, 7)
GROUP BY next_record.category_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT category_id FROM time_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND start_time <= #{time} AND end_time >= #{time} AND is_deleted = 0
AND category_id != #{excludeCategoryId}
AND DAYOFWEEK(date) IN (2, 3, 4, 5, 6)
AND DAYOFWEEK(date) IN (1, 7)
GROUP BY category_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
